title: lyonia doyonensis
intro: Lyonia doyonensis, also known as Doyon's Lyonia, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. It is native to Alaska and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lyonia doyonensis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Lyonia doyonensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
